## Summary

- Describe your changes.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant tests/checks for this change.

## Status Metrics Sync (required when touching status numbers)

- [ ] I did **not** change status metrics in docs/code.
- [ ] If I changed status metrics (version, migration/site counts, test totals), I ran `python scripts/generate_status_metrics.py`.
- [ ] I committed updated `docs/status/STATUS_METRICS.md` and synced or corrected any docs that mention those metrics.
